entities.name: ACREMONIUM STRICTUM
entities.description: Fungus isolated from wilted sorghum plants that causes systemic infection

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Host plant infected by Acremonium strictum

entities.name: PANTNAGAR, UTTAR PRADESH, INDIA
entities.description: Location where wilted sorghum plants were collected

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY
entities.description: The ability of Acremonium strictum to cause disease in sorghum

entities.name: DRENCHING SOIL
entities.description: Inoculation method using a conidial suspension of the pathogen in pots

entities.name: IS 18442
entities.description: Susceptible cultivar of sorghum used in the pathogenicity study

entities.name: DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: The occurrence of disease symptoms in the host plant

entities.name: WEIGHT
entities.description: Grain attribute that is reduced in diseased plants

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: Seed attribute that is reduced in diseased plants

entities.name: SEEDLING VIGOR
entities.description: Seedling attribute that is reduced in diseased plants

entities.name: SYSTEMIC COLONIZATION
entities.description: The spread of the pathogen throughout all parts of the host plant from roots to grains

entities.name: SEED TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The transmission of the pathogen from infected seeds to new plants
